rules.risk_driver: Cash-intensive and high velocity funds movement; established global ML typologies for gambling and betting.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD, gaming license verification, source of funds/wealth, senior approval, cash controls, and enhanced transaction monitoring.

rules.risk_driver: Potential PF, sanctions, export-control and dual-use exposure.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD, sanctions/export-control screening, end-use/end-user checks, license verification, and restricted appetite review.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(bank|banking|central bank|depository|credit intermediation|lending|loan|mortgage|consumer lending|sales financing|credit card|financial transaction|clearinghouse|payment|money transmission|monetary|currency exchange)\b
rules.risk_driver: Large transaction volumes, third-party funds movement, and cross-border financial flows.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD, licensing/regulatory status validation, correspondent/third-party payment assessment, AML control assessment, and enhanced monitoring.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(securities|commodity contracts|brokerage|investment banking|portfolio management|investment advice|funds|trusts|financial vehicle|pension fund|mutual fund|other investment pools|exchange traded fund|hedge fund|private equity)\b
rules.risk_driver: Complex ownership, rapid asset movement, high-value instruments, and layering potential.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD, beneficial ownership and control review, source of wealth/funds, investment mandate validation, and transaction monitoring.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(real estate|property manager|lessors of real estate|land subdivision|real estate agent|real estate broker|appraisal|property developer|property)\b
rules.risk_driver: High-value assets, beneficial ownership opacity, third-party payments, and placement/layering typologies.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD, property ownership checks, source of funds/wealth, purchaser/seller/agent verification, and transaction purpose review.

rules.risk_driver: Portable high-value goods, cash exposure, smuggling, sanctions/PF exposure for gold and precious commodities.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD, supplier/customer due diligence, provenance checks, import/export documentation, sanctions/PF screening, and cash controls.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(legal services|offices of lawyers|lawyers|notary|notarial|accounting|bookkeeping|tax preparation|auditing|trust company|company formation|corporate services|management of companies|holding compan)\b
rules.risk_driver: Potential formation/management of legal persons, client money handling, opacity and nominee structures.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD where services include company/trust formation or client money; UBO verification; source of funds; adverse media.

rules.risk_theme: Pawnbroking / used goods / art / antiques / auctions
rules.risk_driver: Cash transactions, hard-to-value goods, stolen goods exposure, and value transfer through collectibles.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD for high-value items, provenance checks, cash thresholds, adverse media, and transaction monitoring.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(automobile dealer|motor vehicle dealer|recreational vehicle dealer|boat dealer|aircraft dealer|motorcycle dealer|vehicle dealer|motor vehicle merchant wholesaler|aircraft parts|ship building|shipbuilding|boat building)\b
rules.risk_driver: High-value movable assets, trade and cross-border resale exposure.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD for high-value/cross-border purchases, source of funds, ownership and export documentation review.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(oil and gas extraction|crude petroleum|natural gas extraction|petroleum refinery|petroleum products|fuel dealer|pipeline transportation of crude oil|pipeline transportation of natural gas|coal mining|metal ore mining|mining support)\b
rules.risk_driver: Commodity trade, sanctions, corruption, and cross-border payment exposure.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD, sanctions screening, origin/destination checks, commodity documentation, and beneficial ownership review.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(religious|grantmaking|giving services|social advocacy|human rights|environmental advocacy|civic and social organizations|business associations|professional organizations|labor unions|political organizations|charitable|charity|ngo|nonprofit|non-profit)\b
rules.risk_driver: Potential abuse for TF or sanctions evasion depending on geography, beneficiaries, funding sources and delivery channels.
rules.suggested_controls: EDD for cross-border/high-risk geographies, donor/beneficiary checks, purpose and program validation, and sanctions screening.

rules.risk_driver: Trade-based ML, sanctions, dual-use goods, and cross-border counterparties.
rules.suggested_controls: Additional trade due diligence, country/counterparty screening, invoice and shipping document review for risk-based samples.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(restaurant|bar|drinking place|food service|caterer|hotel|motel|accommodation|laundry|drycleaning|beauty salon|barber|nail salon|car wash|parking lot|taxi|limousine|vending machine|gasoline station|convenience store|tobacco|liquor store|beer|wine|night club|nightclub)\b
rules.risk_driver: Cash handling, commingling of funds, and high-frequency low-value transactions.
rules.suggested_controls: Validate expected cash profile, POS/bank statement reasonableness, source of funds, and transaction monitoring thresholds.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(security services|security guard|investigation|armored car|locksmith|protective service|security systems services)\b
rules.risk_driver: Cash logistics, sensitive clients, use of subcontractors, and possible links to high-risk sectors.
rules.suggested_controls: License verification, ownership and adverse media checks, customer/counterparty review, and cash-handling controls.

rules.risk_theme: Waste, scrap, recycling and recoverable materials
rules.risk_driver: Cash purchases, commodity resale, environmental crime and informal supplier networks.
rules.suggested_controls: Supplier/customer checks, permits, transaction monitoring, and review of unusual cash/commodity flows.

rules.risk_driver: Large project payments, subcontracting, cash labor, procurement fraud, corruption and invoice manipulation exposure.
rules.suggested_controls: License verification, beneficial ownership, project rationale, counterparties/subcontractors, and payment purpose review.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(telecommunications|data processing|hosting|internet service|software publisher|computer systems design|computing infrastructure|web search portals|electronic shopping|marketplaces|platforms)\b
rules.risk_driver: Cross-border digital services, online payments, platform misuse and potential virtual-asset adjacency.
rules.suggested_controls: Standard CDD plus assessment of payment flows, user base, jurisdictions, and whether virtual assets/payment services are involved.

rules.keyword_regex: \b(travel agency|tour operator|employment placement|temporary help services|labor contractor|labour contractor|human resources consulting)\b
rules.risk_driver: Cross-border payments, migrant labor, third-party flows and potential human trafficking/labor exploitation indicators.
rules.suggested_controls: License verification, counterparties/beneficiaries, country risk and payroll/payment behavior review.
